description: black to kill without ko. sorry if i didn't get all the variations.
sgf:
(;

AW[ca][cb][dc][bd][cd][dd][ed][ce][ee][fe][ff]
AB[ea][db][fb][ec][gc][fd][gd][be][de][ge][bf][cf][df][ef][hf][eg][fg][gg]
SZ[13]
C[black to kill without ko.]

   (;B[bc] ;W[ab]
      (;B[bb] ;W[ba]
         (;B[ad] ;W[cc] C[white lives.])
         (;B[ac] ;W[cc]
            (;B[aa] ;W[ad] C[white lives.])
            (;B[ad] ;W[ae] C[white lives.])
         )
      )

      (;B[ac] ;W[ad] ;B[bb]
         (;W[ba] C[CHOICE] ;B[aa] ;W[cc] C[white lives.])

         (;W[cc] C[CHOICE]
            (;B[aa] ;W[ba] C[white lives.])
            (;B[ba] ;W[aa] C[white lives.])
         )
      )

      (;B[ad] ;W[ac] ;B[bb] ;W[ba] ;B[aa] ;W[ac] ;B[ab] ;W[cc]
         (;B[ac] ;W[ae]
            (;B[ab] ;W[ac] ;B[bb] C[RIGHT white dies.])
            (;B[ac] ;W[ab]
               (;B[ad] ;W[bc] C[white lives.])
               (;B[af] ;W[ad] C[white lives.])
            )
         )
         (;B[ae] ;W[ac] ;B[ab] ;W[bb] C[ko.])
      )
   )

   (;B[ab] ;W[bc]
      (;B[ac] ;W[ad]
         (;B[ba] ;W[bb] C[white lives.])
         (;B[bb] ;W[aa]] C[white lives.])
      )
      (;B[ad] ;W[ac] ;B[ba]
         (;W[da] C[CHOICE] C[white lives.])
         (;W[ae] C[CHOICE] C[white lives.])
      )
      (;B[bb] ;W[ac] C[white lives.])
   )

   (;B[ac] ;W[bc]
      (;B[ad] ;W[ab] C[white lives.])
      (;B[bb]
         (;W[ba] C[CHOICE] C[white lives.])
         (;W[ab] C[CHOICE] C[white lives.])
      )
      (;B[ab] ;W[ad] ;B[ba] ;W[da] C[white lives.])
   )

   (;B[bb] ;W[bc]
      (;B[ac] ;W[ad] C[white lives.])
      (;B[ba] ;W[ab] C[white lives.])
      (;B[aa] ;W[ac] C[white lives.])
   )

   (;B[ad] ;W[bc]
      (;B[ac] ;W[ab] C[white lives.])
      (;B[ab]; W[ac]
         (;B[bb] ;W[ae] C[white lives.])
         (;B[ba] ;W[ae] C[white lives.])
      )   
   )
)
source: from a game played on KGS.
